build_commands: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 cargo build --manifest-path /workspace/warp/Cargo.toml -p warp --bin warpctrl --features warp/warp_control_cli
PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 cargo build --manifest-path /workspace/warp/Cargo.toml -p warp --bin warp --features warp/warp_control_cli
build_and_launch.launch_notes: Required installing libxcursor1, libx11-xcb1, mesa-utils, libgl1-mesa-dri, mesa-vulkan-drivers and other X11 deps. Warp launched with software GL rendering on Xvfb display :99. App logged in as Zach Lloyd (zach@warp.dev).

build_results.warpctrl: passed after installing protobuf-compiler for protoc

commands.expected_result: List of running Warp instances or denial if disabled
commands.actual_result: Returned JSON with full list of supported actions and instance metadata. exit=0. This command works even with outside_warp_control_enabled=false because instance.list is always allowed.

commands.expected_result: Denial because outside-Warp control is disabled by default
commands.actual_result: Error: {"ok": false, "error": {"code": "local_control_disabled", "message": "outside-Warp local control credential broker is disabled for this instance"}}

commands.expected_result: Toggle on: Warp control outside Warp, Allow metadata reads, Allow underlying data reads, Allow app-state mutations
commands.actual_result: All four toggles successfully enabled in Settings > Scripting UI. Metadata/configuration mutations and underlying data mutations left OFF.

commands.expected_result: List of open files (may be empty)
Open README.md in Warp editor tab
commands.actual_result: Error: {"ok": false, "error": {"code": "missing_target", "message": "file.open requires an active Warp window"}}. The Warp window was not the active/focused window because xterm was on top in the headless X11 environment without a proper window manager.
Error: {"ok": false, "error": {"code": "missing_target", "message": "project.open requires an active Warp window"}}. Same active window issue as file.open.

commands.expected_result: List of Drive notebooks or denial if not authenticated
commands.actual_result: Returned JSON with list of notebook objects including IDs and names. Multiple notebooks returned. exit=0. User was authenticated as zach@warp.dev.

commands.expected_result: List of Drive env-var-collections or denial
commands.actual_result: Returned JSON with list of env_var_collection objects including IDs and names. Multiple collections returned. exit=0.

commands.expected_result: Metadata and content of the specified Drive notebook
commands.actual_result: Returned JSON with content (ai_document_id, conversation_id, data, title) and object metadata (id, name, object_type: notebook). exit=0.

commands.expected_result: Open the Drive object in Warp UI
commands.actual_result: Error: {"ok": false, "error": {"code": "missing_target", "message": "drive.open requires an active Warp window"}}

commands.expected_result: Open the notebook in Warp UI
commands.actual_result: Error: {"ok": false, "error": {"code": "missing_target", "message": "drive.notebook.open requires an active Warp window"}}

commands.expected_result: Open the env-var-collection in Warp UI
commands.actual_result: Error: {"ok": false, "error": {"code": "missing_target", "message": "drive.env_var_collection.open requires an active Warp window"}}

commands.expected_result: Open the share dialog for the Drive object in Warp UI
commands.actual_result: Error: {"ok": false, "error": {"code": "missing_target", "message": "drive.object.share.open requires an active Warp window"}}

observations.warp_app_launch_notes: Required LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1 and MESA_GL_VERSION_OVERRIDE=4.5 for software rendering. Also needed to install libxcursor1, libx11-xcb1, and mesa packages. App started successfully after these dependencies were installed.
observations.drive_id_source: Real IDs from drive list commands (user authenticated as zach@warp.dev)
blockers: All app_state_mutation commands (file.open, project.open, drive.open, drive.notebook.open, drive.env_var_collection.open, drive.object.share.open) failed with 'missing_target' error because they require an active Warp window. In the headless X11 environment without a proper window manager, the Warp window loses active/focused status when the external xterm terminal is brought to the foreground to run commands. This is an environmental limitation of running in a headless Xvfb session without a compositing window manager, not a code bug.
